title: smoke-hot irish plum bake
description: smoke-hot irish plum bake is a tangy and sweet dessert featuring ume plums, smoky bacon, and a crunchy oat topping. this dish is perfect for a special occasion or as a show-stopping dessert at a dinner party.

ingredients.name: bacon
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium bacon for a healthier option

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free flour for a gluten-free option

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: use fresh ginger for the best flavor

instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine the ume plums, bacon, brown sugar, flour, oats, and smoked salt. mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
in a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, vanilla extract, black pepper, and water. add the maple syrup and mix until well combined.
pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
transfer the dough to a parchment-lined baking sheet and shape into a round or rectangular shape.
bake for 35 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set. let cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
